data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. MITCHAM BLUE turned spotting a big start finishing sixth (17.45) last time in a Class 2 at this track. Solid record here at the distance winning two races. Consistent performer from this draw with a win and seven minor placings to his credit. Should be very hard to beat this time. 3. RUBY RED DRESS flew the lids and led throughout to score last time at big odds, winning by a neck at this track over 295m (17.56). Sure to be thereabouts. 7. ROSE PETAL has missed the placings at her last couple but was in the money three back when third (17.43) at this track in a Class 2. Can improve sharply here. 8. OPAWA RIDGE is worth another chance despite missing the top-three here most recently.","runners":[2,3,7,8],"exclusive":false}
